subject: Correction to Circular 4938, =H4043, an unusual high energy transient observed by HETE
body:
The web site showing the light curve for this unusual transient
was incorrectly reported; the correct link can be found at:

http://space.mit.edu/HETE/Bursts/GRB060331

The HETE Ops team apologizes for any confusion caused by this 
error.
